faq.title: Ol askim bilong prais na plen

free.q: Fri plen em i fri tru?
free.a: Yes. Fri plen i gat wanpela Chatforia namba, ring, na salim ol toksave wantaim ol edvetaismen. Yu ken stap long Fri inap long taim yu laik, o apgredim long rausim ol edvetaismen na opim moa ol samting.

plusPremium.q: Wanem samting i narapela long Plus na Premium?
plusPremium.a: Na tu, em i rausim ol edvetaismen na skruim histori bilong ol mesej bilong yu — em i gutpela long yusim long olgeta de. Premium i putim sampela moa samting bilong stretim, ol AI tul bilong raitim gen na bekim, na sapot bilong ol bikpela yusa.

esim.q: Ol eSIM data pek i save wok we?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile i yusim global eSIM kaverej. Sapos yu gat dispela i dipen long kantri na divais bilong yu. Yu bai lukim ol opsen we i gat sapot taim yu kirapim insait long ap.

cancel.q: Mi ken kenselim o senisim ol plen long wanem taim?
cancel.a: Yes. Yu ken menesim o kenselim sabskripsen bilong yu long 'billing page' insait long ap. Ol senis i save kamap long pinis bilong taim bilong yu long baim ol samting.

family.q: Ol Famili pek i wok olsem wanem?
family.a: Ol famili pek i save kamapim wanpela sea data pul long planti Chatforia akaun. Wanpela man tasol i save baim bil, na yu ken singautim o rausim ol memba na putim mak bilong wan wan man.

privacy.a: Yes. Ol mesej na kol i save stap 'end-to-end' enkripsen long 'default'. Yu na man i kisim tasol i ken ritim ol.

howItWorks.title: Chatforia i wok olsem wanem
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia i kamap bilong mekim toktok i kamap isi, hariap, na isi long kisim. Long statim wok, yu mas mekim sampela step tasol.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Yusim email o yusa nem bilong yu long wokim Chatforia akaun bilong yu.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Konektim ol narapela long rot bilong makim ol kontek o kirapim ol nupela toktok.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Ol i save salim ol toksave hariap long givim gutpela toktok.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Translesen we i stap insait long en i helpim ol yusa long toktok long ol narapela narapela tokples.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Lukautim ol samting yu laikim, ol kontek, na ol seting bilong toktok.

safety.title: Sefti na Komyuniti Gaidens
safety.intro: Chatforia i gat strongpela tingting long lukautim gutpela na rispek envairomen bilong olgeta yusa. Ol dispela stia tok i helpim long mekim gutpela ekspiriens bilong olgeta manmeri.
safety.respectDesc: Ol yusa i mas toktok wantaim rispek. Pasin bilong bagarapim, bagarapim, o mekim nogut long man i no orait.

prohibited.illegal: Ol wok we i no stret long lo
prohibited.hate: Tok nogut o pasin bilong luk daun long ol narapela

tools.report: Ripotim pasin o konten we i no stret

tools.control: Lukautim praivesi na ol seting bilong toktok

safety.enforcementDesc: Mipela i ken mekim samting long ol akaun we i brukim ol dispela stia tok, olsem ol tok lukaut, tambu, o rausim olgeta long pletfom.

whyMessaging.title: Bilong wanem ol mesejing pletfom i bikpela samting moa long bipo
whyMessaging.intro: Ol 'messaging platforms' i kamap wanpela bikpela samting bilong toktok long nau. Stat long ol toktok bilong yu yet i go inap long ol wok bisnis, ol mesejing ap i larim ol manmeri long stap konek hariap na gut.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Ol manmeri i save yusim ol mesejing ap long toktok wantaim ol pren, famili, na wanwok long olgeta de. Maski em i wanpela kwik apdet o wanpela longpela toktok, mesejing i givim wanpela gutpela na fleksibel rot bilong stap long toktok.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Wanpela bikpela gutpela samting bilong ol 'messaging platform' em i spit bilong ol. Ol toksave i save kamap hariap tru, na dispela i larim ol yusa long toktok long taim stret. Dispela level bilong isi i mekim na planti manmeri i save laikim moa rot bilong toktok wantaim ol manmeri.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Ol 'messaging platform' i save konektim ol manmeri long olgeta hap bilong wol. Wantaim intanet, ol yusa i ken toktok maski ol i stap long wanem hap, na dispela i mekim isi long kamapim ol rilesensip na wok bung wantaim ol narapela kantri.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Ol nupela mesejing pletfom i lukluk long givim ol yusa kontrol long data na toktok bilong ol. Ol samting olsem 'encryption', 'privacy settings', na 'message controls' i larim ol yusa long toktok gut wantaim.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Ol toksave i wok long senis wantaim ol nupela samting olsem ol bekim we AI i yusim, tanim tok, na serim ol samting long planti samting. Taim teknoloji i go het, ol 'messaging platforms' bai kamap strong moa na i gat planti samting long en.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia i kamap wantaim ol dispela as tingting, na i givim wanpela hariap, seif, na yusa-frendli mesejing ekspiriens bilong wanpela konekted wol.

global.title: Bihain taim bilong Global Komyunikesen
global.intro: Toktok i bin kamap hariap tru long ol laspela tenpela yia. Samting we bipo i nidim ol fon kol o bung wantaim ol narapela, nau ol i ken mekim hariap long rot bilong ol 'messaging platform'. Taim teknoloji i wok long kamap gutpela, global komunikesen i wok long kamap hariap, isi long kisim, na inklusiv.
global.barriersDesc: Wanpela bikpela senis long sait bilong toktok em i daunim ol hevi bilong ples. Ol manmeri i ken toktok wantaim ol narapela manmeri long wol klostu long taim stret. Maski em i bilong ol toktok bilong yu yet, bisnis, o wok bung wantaim, ol 'messaging platform' i mekim 'distance' i no bikpela tumas.
global.translationDesc: Long bipo yet, tok ples i bin stap olsem wanpela bikpela samting we i save pasim rot bilong toktok long olgeta hap bilong wol. Nau yet, ol tul bilong tanim tok i helpim long pasim dispela hevi. Ol pletfom olsem Chatforia i larim ol yusa long toktok isi moa maski ol i toktok long ol narapela narapela tokples, na dispela i kamapim ol nupela sans bilong koneksen na kliagut.
global.realtimeDesc: Spit em i wanpela bikpela samting we i save stiaim toktok bilong nau. Ol yusa i ting olsem ol toksave bai kamap hariap, na ol infrastraksa bilong nau i sapotim dispela tingting. Real-taim mesejing i save mekim ol toktok i kamap gutpela na isi.
global.privacyDesc: Taim toktok i kamap moa dijitel, praivesi na sekyuriti i kamap bikpela samting moa. Ol yusa i laikim bilip olsem ol toktok bilong ol i stap gut. Ol samting olsem 'encryption' na ol 'user-controlled settings' i helpim long sapotim gutpela toktok.
global.futureDesc: Bihain taim bilong global komunikesen bai i gat ol moa gutpela tul, olsem AI-assisted messaging, gutpela trenslesen, na gutpela yusa ekspiriens. Taim teknoloji i wok long senis, toktok bai kamap isi na isi long kisim.
global.outro: Ol pletfom olsem Chatforia em i hap bilong dispela senis, na helpim ol manmeri long konektim isi moa long ol narapela tokples na boda.

chatSafely.title: Hau long toktok gut long intanet
chatSafely.intro: Toktok long intanet i mekim isi moa long toktok wantaim ol manmeri long olgeta hap bilong wol. Maski yu salim mesej i go long ol pren, bungim ol nupela manmeri, o wok bung wantaim long wok, ol mesejing pletfom i save mekim bikpela wok long laip bilong yu long olgeta de. Tasol, stap gut long intanet em i bikpela samting wankain olsem stap konek.

personalInfo.title: Lukautim ol pesonel infomesen bilong yu
personalInfo.body: Wanpela bikpela lo bilong sefti long intanet em long abrusim pasin bilong serim ol sensitif infomesen bilong yu yet. Dispela i gat atres bilong haus bilong yu, ol ditel bilong mani, ol paswod, o ol infomesen bilong luksave long yu we ol i ken yusim long rong wei. Maski yu toktok nating, em i gutpela long tingim gut wanem samting yu serim na husat yu serim wantaim.

safetyFeatures.title: Yusim ol sefti samting we i stap insait long en
safetyFeatures.body: Ol nupela 'messaging' pletfom olsem Chatforia i save givim ol tul bilong helpim ol yusa long stap gut. Ol samting olsem 'blocking', 'reporting', na 'privacy control' em ol i wokim bilong givim ol yusa kontrol long ekspiriens bilong ol. Sapos wanpela i mekim pasin i no stret o mekim yu i no stap isi, yu mas yusim ol dispela tul hariap.

scams.title: Luksave long ol giaman pasin
scams.body: Ol man bilong giaman i save yusim ol 'messaging platform' long giamanim ol yusa long serim ol pesonel infomesen o salim mani. Lukaut long ol toksave we i luk olsem i gutpela tumas long kamap tru, olsem ol ofa yu no tingim, ol askim yu mas mekim hariap, o ol link yu no save long en. Oltaim sekim aidentiti bilong man yu toktok wantaim pastaim long yu mekim wanpela samting.

responsibly.title: Toktok gut wantaim
responsibly.body: Toktok wantaim rispek i helpim long kamapim gutpela ples bilong olgeta manmeri. Noken mekim ol toktok nogut o tok nogut, na tingim olsem wanem ol toktok bilong yu inap long mekim sampela samting long ol narapela. Ol gutpela wok bung i save helpim olgeta yusa long kisim gutpela ekspiriens.

whySafety.title: Bilong wanem Onlain Sefti i Bikpela Samting
whySafety.body: Taim dijitel komunikesen i wok long gro, wok bilong lukautim sefti na tras i kamap bikpela samting moa. Taim ol i bihainim ol besik sefti praktis na yusim ol tul we i stap, ol yusa i ken amamas long ol gutpela samting bilong salim toksave na daunim ol hevi.

chatSafely.conclusion: Long stap gut long intanet yu no nidim bikpela save long teknikel samting - yu mas luksave, was gut, na tingting gut. Sapos yu gat ol stretpela pasin, yu inap long toktok gut wantaim na yu no pret.

about.title: Long Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia em i wanpela gutpela, planti tokples mesenja wantaim 'end-to-end' enkripsen, 'instant translation', na 'voice/video colling'. Wok bilong mipela em i isi: helpim ol manmeri long konektim - gut, praivet, na long ol narapela narapela tokples.

press.title: Pres
press.contactLine: Long ol askim bilong midia, ringim mipela long
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia em i wanpela 'privacy-first messaging app' we i mekim toktok namel long ol narapela narapela tok ples i no hatwok. Ol mesej i gat 'end-to-end' enkripsen long 'default', na 'built-in translation' i save sapotim 100+ tokples long taim stret. Ol yusa i ken opim ol mesej we i lus, holim ol 'read receipts' opsenel, na 'sync' long olgeta divais. I stap long iOS, Android, na long web.

careers.intro: Mipela i wanpela liklik lain we i kirapim Chatforia - wanpela praivet, global mesenja we i wok long kamap long web, iOS, na Android. Sapos yu tingim praivesi, enkripsen, na ol gutpela yusa ekspiriens, mipela i laik harim tok bilong yu.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Enkripsen Enjinia, Telekom Enjinia (Twilio + eSIM).
